subcodes.first_line: All creation hath ever loved and continueth to love the Truth; all turn their faces toward Him and recognize themselves as being from Him, though they be wayward [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: همه عالم حق را دوست داشته و دارند کل باو مقبلند و خود را از او میدانند عاصی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
